items.name_en: Snow Pink🎉 New Prada nylon Hobo handbag/crossbody bag 😘😘 The hobo style that went viral among internet influencers is back with a new design! 👏👏 This Hobo bag has a great design 👍👍 Multi-functional 😘😘 Waist bag/Shoulder bag/Single strap 👍👍 Handles replaced with chains, adding a touch of sexiness as a shoulder bag, and comes with a long strap.
